name: Tdap (Tetanus, Diphtheria, Acellular Pertussis) Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for Tdap (tetanus, reduced diphtheria, acellular pertussis) and Td (tetanus-diphtheria) vaccines for adolescents and adults (age 7+). Used in immunizations for adolescents (IMA) measure. One dose of Tdap is recommended at age 11-12.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids (Td), adsorbed, preservative free, for use in individuals 7 years or older
Tetanus, diphtheria toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine (Tdap), for use in individuals 7 years or older (Boostrix, Adacel)
Tetanus, diphtheria toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine (Tdap), for use in individuals 10 years or older
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids, not adsorbed, for use in individuals 7 years or older
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids (Td), adsorbed, preservative free, for use in individuals 7 years or older, for intramuscular use
Tetanus, diphtheria toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine (Tdap), for use in individuals 7 years or older, for intramuscular use
